# terrible_host (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host` (String) Hostname or IP address

### Optional

- `become` (Boolean) Enable privilege escalation.
- `become_method` (String) Escalation method (sudo, su, pbrun, …). Defaults to sudo.
- `become_password` (String, Sensitive) Password for privilege escalation.
- `become_user` (String) User to become. Defaults to root when become is true.
- `connection` (String) Ansible connection type (e.g. local, ssh, docker). Defaults to ssh.
- `port` (Number) SSH port
- `private_key_path` (String, Sensitive) Path to SSH private key
- `ssh_extra_args` (String) Extra SSH arguments appended to ansible_ssh_extra_args. Defaults to StrictHostKeyChecking=no when unset.
- `user` (String) SSH user
- `vars` (String) Arbitrary Ansible host variables merged into the host object (e.g. ansible_python_interpreter, ansible_shell_type).
- `winrm_port` (Number) WinRM port. Defaults to 5986 when connection is winrm. Requires: pip install terrible[winrm].
- `winrm_scheme` (String) WinRM scheme (http or https). Defaults to https.
- `winrm_server_cert_validation` (String) WinRM server certificate validation (validate or ignore). Defaults to validate.
- `winrm_transport` (String) WinRM transport (ntlm, kerberos, basic, credssp). Defaults to ntlm.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique host ID
